response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned generalist with 20+ years of full-stack experience, genuine distributed-systems work (millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic), and current AI-agent/MCP tooling experience that matches the AI-first emphasis. However, the role is a Principal-level specialist position in growth and experimentation systems, and the resume shows no experimentation platform, A/B testing, feature-flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis experience — the core of the job. There is also little evidence of principal-scope, multi-workstream leadership across teams at enterprise scale; recent roles are senior/staff positions at small companies.
strengths: 20+ years of broad engineering experience with strong software craftsmanship, TDD, and open-source contributions
Real high-scale distributed systems experience: low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, matching the AI-first and AI-velocity preferred qualifications
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the central domain of the role
Weak evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure work or statistical/experimental analysis depth
No demonstrated principal-level, multi-team enterprise scope; strongest scale experience dates to 2011-2013

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and AI tooling
